name: opencode-subagents-view
description: Terminal UI plugin for OpenCode that adds a live "Subagents" panel to the session sidebar. Unofficial, not affiliated with the OpenCode team.
author: Giovanni Calà

scripts.build: bun build src/plugin.tsx --no-bundle --outfile dist/plugin.js --format=esm && bun build src/child-sessions-tracker.ts --no-bundle --outfile dist/child-sessions-tracker.js --format=esm && bun build src/labels-ui.ts --no-bundle --outfile dist/labels-ui.js --format=esm && bun build src/child-sessions-types.ts --no-bundle --outfile dist/child-sessions-types.js --format=esm
